name: chain_acquisition_i_built_a_group_trip_plann
method: [ACQUISITION] I built a group trip planner with a Game Boy aesthetic

stages.task: Apply retro CSS theme (Game Boy, Win95, terminal, or Y2K) to target APP_FACTORY build — pure CSS overlay, no logic changes
Use Playwright to capture styled screenshots at desktop + mobile viewports, produce 3 hero images for posting
Generate r/SideProject post copy emphasizing aesthetic + use case using claude -p, no AI vocabulary, include 'what it does' + 'why retro UI' angle
Post to r/SideProject + r/webdev + r/InternetIsBeautiful + Twitter screenshot thread via Playwright MCP
